CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Tanya Gomerman, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff and specially appearing for Defendant. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-24-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 128.7
Off Calendar Sep-23-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Cypress Insurance Company Lien
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Tanya Gomerman, Esq. (415-545-8608) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Morgan Durham of Bogaards Davis (415-979-0480) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MAUREEN RASMUSSEN'S Motion To Expunge Cypress Insurance Company Lien is GRANTED. The payoff of the lien was included in the CCP 998 statutory settlement offer made by plaintiff and accepted by defendants. If defendants wished to reserve their ability to pursue payment on the lien they purchased from Cypress Insurance Company they should have so stated in their response to plaintiff's 998 offer. Compare defendants' unaccepted 998 offer explicitly referred to the lien. Per standard contract principles which govern the interpretation of 998 agreements, plaintiff's 998 offer and defendants' acceptance thereof created an agreement which covered all monetary terms between plaintiff and defendants, including the lien. Court finds no bad faith. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
